chain.thought: Explanation: Identify athletes who set records outside their home country and also have no records in their home country. Bobby Morrow (United States) set 1 record in Australia and none in the U.S. Donald Quarrie (Jamaica) set 2 records abroad (Colombia and United States) and none in Jamaica. Tommie Smith is excluded because he has a home record in Sacramento. Therefore, Donald Quarrie set the most such records.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The question is interpreted as asking which athlete has the most records set outside their home country while having no records set in their home country. From the table:
- Bobby Morrow (USA) set 1 record abroad (Melbourne, Australia) and none in the USA.
- Donald Quarrie (Jamaica) set 2 records abroad (Cali, Colombia; Eugene, Oregon, USA) and none in Jamaica.
- Tommie Smith (USA) set 1 record abroad (Mexico City, Mexico) but also set a record at home (Sacramento, USA), so he does not qualify.
All other athletes set records only in their home countries. Therefore, Donald Quarrie has the most records abroad among those with no domestic records.
